hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git push'; then if ! npm run lint 1>&2; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Lint failed — fix errors before pushing."}'; exit 1; fi; if ! npm run test 1>&2; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Tests failed — fix errors before pushing."}'; exit 1; fi; if ! npm run build 1>&2; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Build failed — fix errors before pushing."}'; exit 1; fi; fi
